positive: A sophisticated, stylized geometric illustration of a celestial night sky: crescent moons, abstract constellations forming animal shapes, and swirling nebulae rendered in crisp linework and solid blocks of color. The main subjects are stylized galaxies and crescent moons positioned centrally, surrounded by clean, symmetrical geometric patterns like stylized mandalas and repeating arch motifs. Use a limited, deep color palette of midnight blue, teal, gold foil, and creamy white. High contrast, minimalist vector aesthetic, suitable for apparel printing. Clean silhouettes, strong composition, detailed yet scalable linework.
